compositionPolicy.semantics: Preserve the visible label, native text entry, named remove actions, repeated hidden form values, reset, required validation, disabled, and read-only behavior.
compositionPolicy.enhancement: recoverDuplicates is independently removable; false removes live UI, focus movement, callback execution, behavior, and accessibility relationship. Paste delimiters, validation, and reorder controls are separate opt-ins; reorderable=false removes every reorder control and reorder event.
